name: ActiveCampaign
description: Manage contacts and deals in ActiveCampaign
author: awaitstep

contactId.label: Contact ID
contactId.description: Contact ID. Used by: Get Contact, Update Contact.

email.label: Email
email.description: Contact email. Used by: Create Contact, Update Contact.

firstName.label: First Name
firstName.description: First name. Used by: Create Contact, Update Contact.

lastName.label: Last Name
lastName.description: Last name. Used by: Create Contact, Update Contact.

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: Phone number. Used by: Create Contact, Update Contact.

dealTitle.label: Deal Title
dealTitle.description: Deal title. Used by: Create Deal.

dealValue.label: Deal Value
dealValue.description: Deal value in cents. Used by: Create Deal.

dealPipeline.label: Pipeline ID
dealPipeline.description: Pipeline ID. Used by: Create Deal.

dealStage.label: Stage ID
dealStage.description: Stage ID. Used by: Create Deal.
